description: You are a mechatronics engineer. The Python backend decoder for an IoT sensor fleet is failing: the database is rejecting payloads due to checksum errors, logging impossible temperatures/dew points, and clustering all historical data into the current hour. The binary protocol specifies 12-byte Little Endian payloads: Bytes 0-3 (UInt32 TS), Bytes 4-5 (UInt16 ID), Bytes 6-7 (Int16 Temp, scale 0.01), Bytes 8-9 (UInt16 RH, scale 0.01), Byte 10 (UInt8 Status), Byte 11 (UInt8 XOR Checksum of bytes 0-10). Fix the bugs across the decoder and database manager in /home/ga/workspace/
